RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: airman
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The entry-level rank. A colonist who has been formally enlisted.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: airman first class
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A qualified soldier. The first promotion a colonist soldier receives.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: senior airman
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A junior non-commissioned officer. Entrusted with leading a small team.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A seasoned non-commissioned officer responsible for discipline and training.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: technical sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A senior non-commissioned officer with significant experience and leadership responsibilities.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: master sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A senior non-commissioned officer with significant experience and leadership responsibilities.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: first sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A highly experienced non-commissioned officer with extensive leadership and management skills.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: senior master sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The highest-ranking non-commissioned officer, responsible for overall discipline and operations.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: senior first sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The highest-ranking non-commissioned officer, responsible for overall discipline and operations.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: chief master sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The highest-ranking non-commissioned officer of a color-bearing Army unit (battalion or higher).

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: chief first sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The senior enlisted advisor to the commander of a major command, field operating agency, or direct reporting unit.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: command chief master sergeant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The senior enlisted advisor to the commander of a major command, field operating agency, or direct reporting unit.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: chief master sergeant of the air force
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The senior enlisted advisor to the chief of staff of the air force.
